full_text:
1 likes, 1 comments - deccanfounders on June 17, 2026: "GitHub is purchasing AWS cloud capacity to manage an overwhelming surge from AI coding tools, as reported by Business Insider. Microsoft, GitHub's owner, is simultaneously accelerating the platform's migration to its own Azure cloud. AI agents caused a 3.5x load increase, leading to 19 incidents and Mitchell Hashimoto's public departure. This pragmatic multi-cloud move aims to stabilize availability.
Read Full Article: https://deccanfounders.com/2026/17/news/github-infrastructure-strain-pushes-microsoft-to-aws-support/
